Compliance.description: PPRA registered with Fidelity Fund Certificate; established since 1980s; no major recent complaints or regulatory issues found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Positive testimonials on professionalism/efficiency; mixed HelloPeter (some 1-star); no aggregate Google rating found.

Product Value.description: Full letting service matching budget/needs; transparent listings/tools; standard SA pricing.

Innovation.description: Connect app with SOS, marketing tools, academy; site search/blog; virtual tours.

Customer Support.description: Extensive branch phones (e.g. +27 11 801 2500), local agents, WhatsApp; praised for responsiveness.

Accessibility & Security.description: Nationwide website/app access; POPI compliance notice; app supports FICA/POPI tools, no breaches found.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Letting mgmt ~8-10% monthly rent (industry); sales comm 5-7.5% (negotiable)

socialSentiment.summary: Positive site testimonials; isolated complaints; no 2025/2026 scandals.
